notes: Level 6 manual review override shard for spell indexes 35-39 in generated discovery row order.
True Seeing had no detector findings in this packet, but its runtime utility prose was corrected to match the current canonical Truesight-only description.

soul-cage::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Steal Life healing and Borrow Experience advantage are represented, but runtime lacks a generic next-roll advantage token for attack/check/save use.

soul-cage::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: The spell triggers when a visible Humanoid within 60 feet dies, and Eyes of the Dead requires a place the humanoid saw in life on the current plane; runtime records this in options but lacks death-trigger and memory-place eligibility fields.
soul-cage::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Add death-trigger, creature type, and remembered-place eligibility fields.
soul-cage::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deathTriggerSoulCapture and rememberedPlaceEligibility data.

soul-cage::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: Bonus-action Steal Life/Borrow Experience and action Eyes of the Dead are represented as utility options; Steal Life also has a HEALING effect.
soul-cage::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional action field required for this pass.
soul-cage::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by HEALING trigger and UTILITY controlOptions.

soul-cage::vision_light_sound.issue: The visible death trigger, sensor visibility, and visual/auditory sensor feed are represented as targeting and utility options.
soul-cage::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate vision/light/sound field required for this pass.
soul-cage::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by targeting.lineOfSight and UTILITY controlOptions.

soul-cage::illusion_or_disguise.issue: The translucent image visible to creatures that can see the sensor is a sensor presentation detail, not an illusion/disguise mechanic.

soul-cage::sensor_or_remote_perception.issue: Eyes of the Dead creates an invisible sensor at a remembered place on the current plane for concentration up to 10 minutes and provides visual/auditory information; runtime records this as an option but lacks first-class remote sensor fields.
soul-cage::sensor_or_remote_perception.recommendedTemplateChange: Add remote sensor placement, visibility, plane, concentration, and feed fields.

soul-cage::message_or_communication.issue: Query Soul provides a no-action telepathic truthful answer regardless of language with length/knowledge limits; runtime records this as an option but lacks first-class query/answer fields.
soul-cage::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add telepathic query fields with answer truthfulness, knowledge, and length limits.

soul-cage::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Eyes of the Dead requires the named place to be on the caster's current plane; runtime lacks first-class same-plane remote-sensor eligibility fields.
soul-cage::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add plane eligibility fields for remote sensors.

soul-cage::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: The soul only knows what it knew in life and must answer truthfully to the best of its ability; runtime lacks knowledge-source and truthfulness fields.

soul-cage::object_stats_or_damageability.issue: The material cage stores the soul and can be destroyed to end the spell, but runtime lacks object lifecycle/destroy-to-end fields.

soul-cage::status_or_state_change.issue: The dead humanoid cannot be revived while the soul is trapped; runtime records this as an option but lacks first-class revival prevention.

soul-cage::environmental_change.issue: The detector matched Steal Life healing text; this is healing/resource use, not environmental change.

soul-cage::conditional_ending.issue: The spell ends when the cage is destroyed or after the sixth exploit releases the soul; runtime records this as options but lacks first-class use-count and object-destruction end triggers.
soul-cage::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add use-count and object-destruction ending fields.
soul-cage::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime useCountEndCondition and objectDestroyedEndCondition data.

sunbeam::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Constitution save and half-damage outcome are represented by the DAMAGE effect.

sunbeam::vision_light_sound.issue: Blinded, Bright Light, Dim Light, and sunlight are represented as STATUS_CONDITION and UTILITY light data.
sunbeam::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by STATUS_CONDITION Blinded and UTILITY light.

sunbeam::status_or_state_change.issue: Blinded until the start of the caster's next turn is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION effect.

sunbeam::conditional_ending.issue: The repeat Magic action to create a new line is represented as an on_caster_action DAMAGE trigger and a granted action.
sunbeam::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE trigger and UTILITY grantedActions.

tensers-transformation::attack_or_save_m.issue: Weapon attack advantage, Strength/Constitution save proficiency, and end DC 15 Constitution save are represented as options/status effect, but runtime lacks proficiency-grant and fixed-DC end-save fields.
tensers-transformation::attack_or_save_m.recommendedTemplateChange: Add proficiency grant and fixed-DC end-save fields.
tensers-transformation::attack_or_save_m.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime proficiencyGrants and fixedDcEndSave data.

tensers-transformation::healing_or_resto.issue: The 50 temporary Hit Points are represented as a HEALING effect with isTemporaryHp true.

tensers-transformation::object_stats_or_.issue: The detector matched temporary Hit Points; this is temporary healing, not object stats.

tensers-transformation::conditional_endi.issue: Cannot cast spells during the spell, temporary HP loss at end, and the exhaustion save immediately after ending are represented as options/status, but runtime lacks first-class spellcasting restriction and end-trigger aftermath fields.
tensers-transformation::conditional_endi.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spellcasting restriction, temporary-HP cleanup, and on-spell-end save fields.
tensers-transformation::conditional_endi.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime spellcastingRestriction and onSpellEndSave data.

tensers-transformation::aftermath_or_mem.issue: Temporary HP loss and possible Exhaustion after the spell ends are represented, but runtime lacks first-class aftermath trigger data.

transport-via-plants::vision_light_sound.issue: The destination plant must have been seen or touched before; runtime records this as an option but lacks first-class prior familiarity fields.

transport-via-plants::travel_or_planar_m.issue: The plant link allows same-plane travel at any distance using 5 feet of movement; runtime represents teleport movement but lacks first-class linked portal/plant endpoint fields.
transport-via-plants::travel_or_planar_m.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked endpoint travel fields for portals/plants.

transport-via-plants::environmental_chan.issue: The magical plant link is represented as movement plus utility options; it does not otherwise alter the environment.
transport-via-plants::environmental_chan.recommendedTemplateChange: No environmental field required for this pass.
transport-via-plants::environmental_chan.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT teleport and UTILITY options.
